Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver'S Final Report And Accouint; (2) Discharging Receiver, And Terminating Receivership; (3) Approving Of Receivership Fees And Costs; And (4) Exoneration Of Receivership Bond
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. PLAINTIFF EAST WEST BANK's Motion For Order (1) Approving Receiver's Final Report And Account; (2) Discharging Receiver And Terminating Receivership; (3) Approving Of Receivership Fees And Costs; And (4) Exoneration Of Receivership Bond is granted. No opposition filed. The moving party is to prepare a proposed order. Judge: Peter Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.

Plaintiff'S Application Appointing Receiver, Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
Off Calendar May-17-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Atty. Joseph M. alosic of Malcolm * Cisneros (949-252-9400) appear for East West Bank moving party.
Atty. Jerry Threet of City Attorney Office (415-554-3914) appear for City and County of San Francisco third party.

Discussion, tentative ruling is adopted, Plaintiff'S order to show cause for Application for Appointment Receiver is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. Order signed in open court. Judge Peter J Busch, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (D501)
